description: Print the first 10 lines of each 'FILE' to standard output.

option.name: --bytes
tip: print the first NUM bytes of each file;
with the leading '-', print all but the last NUM bytes of each file

option.name: --lines
tip: print the first NUM lines instead of the first 10;
with the leading '-', print all but the last NUM lines of each file

option.name: --silent
tip: never print headers giving file names

option.name: --verbose
tip: always print headers giving file names

option.name: --zero-terminated
tip: line delimiter is NUL, not newline
